mapper.insert: INSERT INTO code_chunk (repo_id, file_id, chunk_type, symbol_name, api_path, http_method, start_line, end_line, content, metadata, embedding, created_at) VALUES (CAST(#{repoId} AS uuid), CAST(#{fileId} AS uuid), #{chunkType}, #{symbolName}, #{apiPath}, #{httpMethod}, #{startLine}, #{endLine}, #{content}, CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), #{embedding}::vector, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM code_chunk WHERE repo_id = CAST(#{repoId} AS uuid)
mapper.select: SELECT cc.id AS "chunkId", cc.repo_id AS "repoId", cf.file_path AS "filePath", cf.file_type AS "fileType", cc.chunk_type AS "chunkType", cc.symbol_name AS "symbolName", cc.api_path AS "apiPath", cc.http_method AS "httpMethod", cc.start_line AS "startLine", cc.end_line AS "endLine", 1.0 / (1.0 + (cc.embedding <-> #{vectorLiteral}::vector)) AS score, CASE WHEN length(cc.content) > 1200 THEN substring(cc.content from 1 for 1200) || E'\n...[truncated]' ELSE cc.content END AS "contentPreview", cc.metadata::text AS metadata FROM code_chunk cc JOIN code_file cf ON cf.id = cc.file_id WHERE cc.repo_id = CAST(#{repoId} AS uuid) ORDER BY cc.embedding <-> #{vectorLiteral}::vector LIMIT #{limit}
